debug_text.text: '[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v3 patch applied (blocking wait index 1 restored; match accumulators on this.$tm_*)'
'[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v4 patch applied (save/load resume rebuild guard for this.$tm_* snapshots)'
'[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v7: reset match accumulators on each fresh run_script entry (fixes stale MK3 trades leaking into MK1 export)'
'[GT-TradeMatch] lib.gt.tradematch v8: post-wait resume only when offer scratch lost (fixes MK3 live-search freeze from v7 unconditional resume)'

do_if.value: $stickyCyclesLeft gt 0 and $stickySource? and $stickyDestination? and $stickyWare? and $stickySource == $sourceStation and $stickyDestination == $station and $stickyWare == $wareText

set_value.name: $tmBuyListForWare
set_value.exact: if $ware? and this.$tm_buyOffersByWare? and this.$tm_buyOffersByWare.{$ware}? then this.$tm_buyOffersByWare.{$ware} else []

do_if.value: ($buyStation.isclass.ship and ($buyStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $buyStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)) or ($sellStation.isclass.ship and ($sellStation.type == shiptype.carrier or $sellStation.type == shiptype.resupplier))
$scoreMode == 'supply' and $backtrackTolerance? and $backtrackTolerance ge 0 and (not $maxDistanceBuy? or $maxDistanceBuy le 0)
$mk4CustomerMustBePlayer and $mk4AllowPlayerSuppliers and $mk4AllowAiSuppliers and $mk4PlayerBuyModPct gt 0 and $buyStation? and $buyStation.isplayerowned
global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$Debug.$EnableDebugLogging and this.$tm_supplyScoreDiagCount lt 8

debug_text.text: '[GT-TradeMatch] ' + $ship.idcode + ': supply-score diag ware=' + $ware + ' tradeAmount=' + $tradeAmount + ' distFactor=' + $distanceFactor + ' expr=' + $tradeAmount + '/' + $distanceFactor

do_if.value: $mk4CustomerMustBePlayer and $sellStation? and $sellStation.exists and $sellStation.isplayerowned and not $sellStation.isclass.buildstorage and $ware?

wait.comment: Yield after each sell-offer loop (blocking action index 1; match state on this.$tm_*)

return.value: table[ $Found = (this.$tm_bestTrade != null), $BestTrade = this.$tm_bestTrade, $BestScore = this.$tm_bestScore, $TradeList = this.$tm_tradeList, $TradesEvaluated = this.$tm_tradesEvaluated, $TradesRejected = this.$tm_tradesRejected, $TradesRejectedRouteIllegal = this.$tm_tradesRejectedRouteIllegal, $TradesRejectedMk4CustomerPolicy = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4CustomerPolicy, $TradesRejectedMk4SupplierPolicy = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4SupplierPolicy, $TradesRejectedMk4TypePolicy = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4TypePolicy, $TradesRejectedMk4DemandGate = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4DemandGate, $TradesRejectedMk4PriceCap = this.$tm_tradesRejectedMk4PriceCap, $TradesRejectedDistance = this.$tm_tradesRejectedDistance ]
